testcase.name: test.test_http
testcase.error: test/test_http.py:2: in <module> import fmi_weather_client.http as http fmi_weather_client/__init__.py:5: in <module> from fmi_weather_client import http fmi_weather_client/http.py:145: in <module> def _handle_errors(response: requests.Response): ^^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'requests' is not defined

testcase.name: test.test_init
testcase.error: test/test_init.py:6: in <module> import fmi_weather_client fmi_weather_client/__init__.py:5: in <module> from fmi_weather_client import http fmi_weather_client/http.py:145: in <module> def _handle_errors(response: requests.Response): ^^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'requests' is not defined

testcase.error: test/test_models.py:2: in <module> from fmi_weather_client.models import FMIPlace, Value fmi_weather_client/__init__.py:5: in <module> from fmi_weather_client import http fmi_weather_client/http.py:145: in <module> def _handle_errors(response: requests.Response): ^^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'requests' is not defined
